overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in wizard robes walking through a cozy, circular common room with wooden ceilings, stone walls, and warm lantern lighting. The character moves from the entry area toward a wooden door, passing by furniture and decor typical of a medieval magical dormitory.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room circular living space

events.description: camera tilts down from ceiling view to follow the character walking into the room

agents.ego_description: wizard student in green hat and red scarf walking into the common room from the left side

entered.detail: domed wooden ceiling with radial planks and heavy support beams
thick timber beams crossing the ceiling structure
crimson hanging banners with gold emblems
lit iron lantern suspended from ceiling providing warm light
black metal wood-burning stove with vertical pipe extending to ceiling
polished wooden floorboards with area rugs
tall dark wood storage cabinet with glass doors
arched wooden double doors with stone surround at far end of room
round upholstered seat with red checkered fabric

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view looking up at the circular wooden ceiling of a wizard's common room. The camera tilts down to reveal a student character entering from the left, walking across the wooden floor past a cast iron stove and dark wooden furniture. Warm lantern light illuminates the stone walls and red banners hanging from the ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the exit door of the common room

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden archway door at the far end of the circular room

entered.detail: tall pile of leather-bound books stacked beside the wardrobe
large dark wood armoire with carved details
framed painting of a bearded man in robes hanging on stone wall
tall ornate mirror with dark frame reflecting the room interior

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking across the common room toward the arched wooden exit door. The camera passes the central stove and ottoman, revealing a wooden wardrobe, stack of books, and framed portrait on the right wall. The character approaches the door as the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a high-angle view of a circular ceiling and descends to track a student character crossing a cozy, lantern-lit common room. It begins by tilting down from the wooden rafters to reveal the character entering from the left and walking across the floor past a cast iron stove and red banners. As the character advances, the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective, gliding past dark wooden furniture and an ottoman. The scene then expands to reveal a wooden wardrobe, stacks of books, and a framed portrait lining the stone walls on the right. Finally, the movement carries the character forward until they approach the arched wooden exit door at the far side of the room.
